# Contact Refiner

> Open-source AI-powered tool that automatically fixes diacritics, formatting, and duplicates in Google Contacts. Runs a daily pipeline with 26 rule categories, Claude AI review for ambiguous cases, and a web dashboard where you approve every change before it applies. 22,000+ changes applied across 5,500+ contacts.

Contact Refiner is built for people who manage large Google Contacts databases, especially with Slovak and Czech names that need proper diacritical marks. It combines rule-based analysis with AI judgment, a learning system that remembers your review decisions, and a daily email digest.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://contactrefiner.com): Landing page with features, stats, and how it works
- [Dashboard](https://contactrefiner.com/dashboard): Pipeline status, current batch progress, last run stats
- [Review](https://contactrefiner.com/review): Review and approve pending contact changes with bulk actions
- [Analytics](https://contactrefiner.com/analytics): Change breakdown by field type, confidence, and daily trends
- [Changelog](https://contactrefiner.com/changelog): Full history of all changes applied to contacts
- [Pipeline Runs](https://contactrefiner.com/runs): History of automated pipeline executions
- [Privacy Policy](https://contactrefiner.com/privacy): Data handling and privacy information

## Features

- [Diacritics Restoration](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Context-aware Slovak/Czech name accent restoration
- [Smart Formatting](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Phone number, title, and name casing normalization
- [Contact Cleanup](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Flags low-value contacts with missing data
- [AI Review](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Claude AI catches edge cases that rules miss
- [Learning System](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Remembers review decisions, adjusts confidence
- [Daily Email Digest](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Morning summary of overnight pipeline results
- [Interaction Tracking](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Gmail/Calendar activity tagging
- [Privacy First](https://contactrefiner.com/#features): Self-hosted, contacts never leave your Google account

## Technical

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/instarea-sk/google-contacts-refiner): Source code, issues, and documentation
- [API](https://contactrefiner.com/api): REST API for dashboard data (auth-protected)

## Optional

- [Configuration](https://contactrefiner.com/config): Pipeline configuration and environment details
